headline: World’s ‘largest’ grid battery part of Google-Xcel Energy agreement
summary: Form Energy will supply iron-air batteries for the 300 MW/30 GWh deployment, which the parties say will bolster Xcel’s Upper Midwest grid with cost-effective multiday energy storage.
